nodes.context: Dominican gang active in Washington Heights, Manhattan, early 1990s, involved in cocaine trafficking.
Violent Dominican gang targeted in New York City crackdown.
Violent Dominican gang targeted in New York City crackdown.

edges.evidence_quote: The successful crackdown against the Jheri Curls was part of a larger effort in New York City to arrest and prosecute violent Dominican gangs that would ultimately be extended to crews like the Wild Cowboys and the Young Talented Children.
edges.context: The Jheri Curls and Wild Cowboys were both targeted in the same law enforcement crackdown on Dominican gangs.
